prompt: Create a dramatic digital scene merging the Batman silhouette from Image 1 with the airplane silhouette from Image 2, set against a moody, cloud-filled sky.
prompt_refined: Generate a dramatic digital scene. A large, stark silhouette of Batman, based on Image 1, is positioned prominently in the midground, facing right. In the upper-right portion of the frame, a distinct silhouette of an airplane, referencing Image 2, flies in the distance. Both figures are depicted as pure black against a vast, moody, and densely cloud-filled sky, rendered with deep twilight or pre-dawn hues and dramatic, atmospheric lighting that emphasizes the silhouettes.
objects: Large, stark, pure black Batman silhouette (prominently in midground, facing right)
Distinct, pure black airplane silhouette (in upper-right, flying in the distance)
Sky with deep twilight or pre-dawn hues
